/usr/bin/c++     CMakeFiles/online_platform.dir/src/webserver/HttpParser.cpp.o CMakeFiles/online_platform.dir/src/webserver/Log.cpp.o CMakeFiles/online_platform.dir/src/webserver/Reactor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/online_platform.dir/src/webserver/ThreadPool.cpp.o CMakeFiles/online_platform.dir/src/webserver/webserver_old.cpp.o CMakeFiles/online_platform.dir/src/webserver/webserver_stage1.cpp.o  -o online_platform  -lpthread
